features.name: Swarm
features.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny snake. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Bites
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) Piercing damage—or 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied—plus 10 (3d6) Poison damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: High-Damage Poison Swarm - Elite venomous assault unit
tactical_info.positioning: Amphibious movement allows versatile positioning in mixed terrain
tactical_info.damage_output: 18 total damage (8 piercing + 10 poison) or 16 when bloodied
tactical_info.key_abilities: Massive poison damage, high AC for swarm, amphibious
tactical_info.weaknesses: Limited blindsight range, vulnerable to poison resistance
tactical_info.synergies: Devastating damage dealer for mid-tier encounters
